mainEntity.name: What steps must Chicago law firms take to appear in Perplexity AI recommendations?
mainEntity.text: What steps must Chicago law firms take to appear in Perplexity AI recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: Chicago firms need peer-reviewed listings in Chambers or Super Lawyers, reinforced by website structured data and PR, as Perplexity prioritizes authoritative directories over SEO.

suggestedAnswer.text: Step 1: Audit current AI mentions. Step 2: Secure third-party recognitions. Step 3: Align website bios with directory language. Step 4: Use schema markup for profiles. AI reflects existing legal prestige, so invest in directories first. Opposing counsel could use your visibility against you in competitive bids—strategize disclosures.

name: Steps for Chicago Law Firms in Perplexity AI
